title: selaginella moszkowskii
intro: Selaginella moszkowskii, also known as Spiny Club Moss or Spiny Resurrection Fern, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella moszkowskii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
